rationale.root_cause: The model produced no analysis, so it did not identify the FLAW site or explain the buffer over-read mechanism. No mention of the loop using destLen to index into a smaller source buffer was made.
rationale.local_fix: No fix was proposed to bound reads by the source length or ensure proper null-termination. Therefore it does not satisfy the local_fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: No suggestion was made to pass explicit lengths through the API. Thus it fails the global_fix requirement.
